MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by Latonya Glover.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Edith Clark is present.
Attorney Marilyn Underwood representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of DEC-5-2011 is vacated.
